    Events made easy

    All the tools you need to effortlessly manage your events and tickets on WordPress.

    Calendar Tickets
    The Events Calendar

    The #1 calendar for WordPress

    Learn why more than 800,000 people trust us to power their events.

    See it in action
    Event Tickets

    Grow ticket sales

    Add tickets and RSVPs to your WordPress site, with or without a calendar.

    Get started

    800k+ installs powering over one billion events

    Built for your events

    Our products make event management a snap, from promotion and ticket sales to registration and communication.

    Fully flexible and totally customizable plugins that work seamlessly with your site.

    Our event tools help you make the most of your events: Build your brand, bolster attendance, and connect with your audience.

    The Events Calendar suite of tools is perfect for schools and universities, community groups, and civic organizations.

    Our Products

    The Events Calendar

    Power your events for free with The Events Calendar, or upgrade to Pro to unlock recurring events, views, premium support, and more.

    Event Tickets

    Manage ticketing and RSVPs for free with Event Tickets, or upgrade to Plus to unlock custom registration fields, advanced widgets, premium support and more.

    Community

    Add a form to your website so users can submit events to your calendar. Let users create and sell tickets for events they submit, and split the revenue.

    Event Aggregator

    Effortlessly fill your calendar with events from Meetup, Eventbrite, iCal, Google Calendar, and more.

    Promoter

    Email event communication made specifically for The Events Calendar.

    Filter Bar

    Filters let users search events by category, venue, organizer, day of the week, and more.

    Event Schedule Manager

    Easily create the perfect schedule for your event and display it on any post type — including events from The Events Calendar, of course!

    Eventbrite Tickets

    Create Eventbrite tickets and events right from your WordPress dashboard.

    Seating

    Create interactive seating maps that allow customers to choose their own seats. Add seat types like VIP to provide unique experiences while maximizing revenue.

    Frequently Asked Questions

    To keep your plugin up-to-date and retain access to assistance from our support team, yes, you need to renew each year.

    However, that doesn’t mean you have to renew in order to keep using our products. Once you download and install our plugins, they’re yours to use as long as you like. But if you don’t renew your subscription, you won’t receive important product updates or support.

    Installing The Events Calendar is the best way to try it out. This plugin is available for free from the WordPress plugin directory and includes all of the core calendar features.

    If you’re curious about the features included in Events Calendar Pro, we have a live demo you can check out.

    Nope! Event Tickets works with or without The Events Calendar. Even if you don’t have The Events Calendar, you can create RSVPs and tickets on WordPress pages and posts.

    The Events Calendar is our cornerstone plugin, and it’s required in order to run any of our premium calendar add-ons, including Events Calendar Pro, Community Events, Filter Bar, and others.

    In other words, Events Calendar Pro runs alongside The Events Calendar and enhances it with extra features, including recurring events, event series, additional calendar views, calendar shortcodes, advanced widgets, custom event fields and more.

    Event Tickets is our cornerstone plugin for ticketing. This free add-on lets you create RSVPs and add tickets to events, pages and posts in WordPress.

    Event Tickets Plus is a premium add-on. It runs alongside Event Tickets and provides additional features, including custom ticket fields and the ability to integrate with other e-commerce platforms, including WooCommerce and Easy Digital Downloads. An Event Tickets Plus subscription also gives you access to product updates and premium support.

    Top-notch support

    All of our premium plugins and add-ons are backed by a knowledgeable support team.

    Support you can count on
